title: regression: "Signal unoptimizable: Circular combinational logic" reported by new version but not old

features.name: foreach loop over unpacked array in always_comb
features.description: Code should include a foreach loop iterating over an unpacked array parameter inside an always_comb block
features.snippet:
always_comb begin
  foreach (status_regs [index]) begin
  end
end

features.name: interface with parameterized unpacked array port
features.description: Code should include an interface with a parameterized unpacked array as an input port

features.name: indexed bit-vector assignment in foreach loop
features.description: Code should include indexed assignments to bit-vector variables using indexed array elements inside a foreach loop

features.name: variable declaration inside conditional block in always_comb
features.description: Code should include a variable declaration placed inside a conditional if block within an always_comb procedure
